j[v]==423474-423474 then j[v],F[v]=nil,nil end end,function(v,Z)local q=a(Z)local W=function(W,l,d,G)return T(v,{W;l;d,G},Z,q)end return W end return(M(558911+-270325,{}))(q(s))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[Z(111639+-108049)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
